detectors.description:
Reentrancy in DEP_BANK.Collect(uint256) (DEP_BANK.sol#81-105):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (DEP_BANK.sol#93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (DEP_BANK.sol#97)
	DEP_BANK.balances (DEP_BANK.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- DEP_BANK.Collect(uint256) (DEP_BANK.sol#81-105)
	- DEP_BANK.Deposit() (DEP_BANK.sol#65-77)
	- DEP_BANK.balances (DEP_BANK.sol#9)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [DEP_BANK.Collect(uint256)](DEP_BANK.sol#L81-L105):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](DEP_BANK.sol#L93)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] -= _am](DEP_BANK.sol#L97)
	[DEP_BANK.balances](DEP_BANK.sol#L9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [DEP_BANK.Collect(uint256)](DEP_BANK.sol#L81-L105)
	- [DEP_BANK.Deposit()](DEP_BANK.sol#L65-L77)
	- [DEP_BANK.balances](DEP_BANK.sol#L9)
